arts.ttl: Bristol City's top-six rivals hire experienced Championship manager after Christmas Eve exit
arts.sum: Bristol City's Championship rivals West Brom have hired Tony Mowbray as their new manager almost a month after Carlos Corberan's exit. Bristol City Live is now on WhatsApp and we want you to join our community.

arts.ttl: Coventry City transfer state of play as calls made on pair with 'potential' for more moves
arts.sum: He and his staff will assess both Burroughs and Howley upon their return and, if the pieces fall into place and the Sky Blues are able to secure a sufficient number of new faces, then Lampard sees no reason why the pair cannot head back out on loan this month. They have made calls to recall both Ryan Howley from his loan spell with Ayr United and Jack Burroughs from Kilmarnock.

arts.ttl: What Bristol City can expect from Frank Lampard's Coventry City after 'shock to the system'
arts.sum: Bristol City Live is now on WhatsApp and we want you to join our community. Frank Lampard's Sky Blues are currently 16th in the Championship table, only six points clear of Hull City who occupy the final spot in the relegation zone and 12 away from the top six.

arts.ttl: Coventry City predicted XI v Bristol City with four decisions awaiting Frank Lampard
arts.sum: While Bobby Thomas has been a regular, the selection otherwise recently has been relatively fluid - in the cup, it was Joel Latibeaudiere who missed out to Thomas, Liam Kitching - who scored - and Luis Binks. Since, though, there has been the shot in the arm of FA Cup progress, claimed at the expense of Sheffield Wednesday on penalties last weekend, but the focus returns solely on the Championship, and the first of the latest three-game week.

arts.ttl: Coventry City handed injury boost ahead of Bristol City clash as Lampard shares fitness update
arts.sum: Bristol City Live is now on WhatsApp and we want you to join our community. Coventry City have been handed an injury boost ahead of Bristol City's trip to The CBS Arena with Frank Lampard confirming Ben Wilson is once again available for selection.

arts.ttl: FA Cup: Chelsea, Man Utd, Liverpool and Tottenham new dates revealed as fourth round TV schedule is announced
arts.sum: Some intriguing ties will take place in the fourth round of the FA Cup

arts.ttl: Swansea City, Bristol City looking to bring 24-year-old defender back to England
arts.sum: Swansea City and Bristol City are interested in Amiens SC defender Osaze Urhoghide, according to a report from… The post Swansea City, Bristol City looking to bring 24-year-old defender back to England appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Frank Lampard confirms ex-Bristol City favourite is training with Coventry ahead of Reds clash
arts.sum: Frank Lampard has confirmed that former Bristol City favourite Jamie Paterson is training with Coventry City ahead of the Sky Blues' clash with the Reds this weekend. Bristol City Live is now on WhatsApp and we want you to join our community.

arts.ttl: Coventry City hit with fine for half-time melee against Sheffield United
arts.sum: The incident at the CBS Arena saw Blades defender Anel Ahmedhodzic receive a red card just before half-time after he was seen grabbing Coventry's Norman Bassette by the throat and pushing him to the ground, allegedly in response to a comment made by the forward. Sheffield United and Coventry City have been hit with fines of £80,000 and £10,000 respectively following a half-time bust-up in their Sky Bet Championship game in November.

arts.ttl: Every word Manning said on Bristol City transfers, Mayulu's confidence, Coventry clash and more
arts.sum: There were some really good bits second half and even first half, some of the press at times was really good and then other times, when you're playing against that level of opposition and that level of player, when we didn't quite get it right, they went through us and obviously, had that kind of 15-minute spell where they were extremely dangerous. I think when you've had the volume of injuries he's had in the same area that he's had, it makes it more difficult, but I think the biggest bit of the conversation we've had and knowing Ayman's character extremely well, is he's going to give it absolutely everything to give it the best shot possible of coming back.
